features.name: Add Project by GitHub URL
features.notes: 背景輪詢 5 分鐘 refresh 已完成，live feature sync 完成

features.name: Spec Ingestion Pipeline
features.notes: Markdown parser 已完成，DOCX/XLSX AI fallback 完成

features.name: Storage Abstraction & Schema v2
features.notes: Async ProjectsRepository + namespaced localStorage + schema v1→v2 migration + ADR-006

features.name: Multi-view Dashboard Shell
features.notes: 13-view shell：Projects, Dashboard, Project Files, Plugins, AI Engineers, Sessions, Channels, Cron Jobs, Logs, Documentation, Keys, Settings, Features。lifted run state, CronJob engine, app shell routing 完成

features.name: API Key Storage in OS Keychain
features.notes: keyring crate，API key 不進 renderer

features.name: Plugins View
features.notes: v2 catalog（discriminated union: provider/cli/editor/mcp/skill）+ v1→v2 一次性 migration + Marketplace 三 tab UI（Installed / Marketplace / Skills）+ Configure 展開表單。共用 selector helpers 在 lib/storage/plugins.ts。

features.name: Documentation View
features.notes: Hermes Agent API Explorer：fetch /openapi.json，11 個群組側欄，method badge 色碼，endpoint 展開顯示 params/requestBody/responses，LIVE/OFFLINE 狀態指示器。Group.match TS 型別修正完成。

features.name: Sessions View — AI Conversation History
features.notes: 雙欄 UI + AgentSession/SessionMessage + Rust call_anthropic 自動寫入 sessions 目錄。IngestionView AI 解析帶 sessionId + sessionsDir，並改走 KeysView 統一的 anthropic 金鑰位置。

features.name: Channels View
features.notes: Phase 1（設定表單）+ Phase 2（Telegram long-poll Rust bridge、Start/Stop UI、Recent Activity）+ Phase 3（指令接通真實資料）：/help 列出啟用的指令、/status 多專案摘要與 /status <name> 單專案 in_progress 前 8、/report 過去 7 天 updatedAt 變動的功能、/run <featureId> 用該專案第一個 agent 派遣並回 PID。allowed_chat_ids gate + /run 預設 disabled 為兩層安全閥。

features.name: Cron Jobs View
features.notes: UI 完成（新增/編輯/刪除/啟用、next run 倒計時、歷史紀錄）。Engine 在 MainClient setInterval（dev only），Tauri Rust cron_tick command 待實作。

features.name: Logs View
features.notes: 三 tab（Runs / Cron / Dev Logs）完成；agent runs + cron history 接通；dev logs tab 需掃描 projectRoot，後端支援待做。

features.name: Keys View
features.notes: Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini / GitHub PAT 統一管理；Tauri 走 OS Keychain、瀏覽器走 localStorage；show/hide toggle 完成。

features.name: AI Engineers Setting
features.notes: master-detail 兩欄 UI；5 個預設角色模板（Frontend/Backend/Fullstack/QA/DevOps）；EngineerRole 存於 ProjectManagerConfig.engineerRoles（project-level）；TaskDispatchModal 整合：角色選擇器 + systemPrompt + referenceFiles 自動注入 prompt；schema.json 加 engineerRole definition

features.name: MCP Server Lifecycle
features.notes: Rust commands：mcp_spawn / mcp_kill / mcp_status_all / mcp_logs / mcp_logs_dir + write_mcp_config + open_path。In-memory rolling log buffer (2000 lines) + 持久檔。前端 PluginsView Installed tab 內 Start/Stop/Restart/Logs 控制 + onMcpStatus 事件即時更新。TaskDispatchModal/BatchDispatchModal 透過 augmentArgsWithMcp 把 enabled stdio MCP servers 注入 Claude/Aider CLI（--mcp-config flag）。

features.name: Skills Marketplace
features.notes: Rust commands：skill_default_dir / skill_list / skill_install_from_url / skill_uninstall / skill_move_files。前端 Plugins → Skills tab：URL 安裝、Rescan、Open folder、Browse skillsmp.com。SettingsView 可改 skills 目錄並提供 move-existing 對話框。預設 ~/.claude/skills 跨平台。

features.name: Interactive Terminal Spawn
features.notes: spawn_terminal Rust command：開新的系統 Terminal 視窗執行 CLI（PM 不接管 stdout），給 Claude Code interactive / Aider / Codex 互動模式用。TaskDispatchModal 提供「在 Terminal 開啟」按鈕，macOS 用 AppleScript do script，注意換行需 flatten。

engineerRoles.name: Frontend Engineer
engineerRoles.systemPrompt: You are a senior frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Focus on component architecture, type safety, and pixel-perfect UI. Follow the project's existing patterns. Prefer composition over inheritance, keep components small and focused.

engineerRoles.name: Backend Engineer
engineerRoles.systemPrompt: You are a senior backend engineer working with Rust and Tauri v2. Focus on Rust bridge commands, process management, security, and performance. Write safe Rust code, handle errors with Result types, never expose secrets to the renderer.

engineerRoles.name: Full-stack Engineer
engineerRoles.systemPrompt: You are a senior full-stack engineer working on a Tauri desktop app with Next.js frontend and Rust backend. Balance UI quality with solid Rust bridge design. Read the ADRs before making architectural decisions.
